description: A list of subscription resources matching the request criteria.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#subscriptionListResponse.

nextPageToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

prevPageToken.description: The token for the previous page of results.

pageInfo.description: Paging details for a list operation, including information about the total number of resources and the number per page.

totalResults.description: The total number of results in the result set.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in the API response.

items.description: A list of subscriptions that match the request criteria.
A subscription resource contains information about a YouTube user's subscription to a channel.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#subscription.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the subscription.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about the subscription.

publishedAt.description: The date and time that the subscription was created.

resourceId.description: The resourceId object contains information about the resource to which the subscriber subscribed.

kind.description: The type of the API resource.

channelId.description: The value that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the channel that the user subscribed to.
The ID of the channel that the subscription belongs to.

thumbnails.description: A map of thumbnail images associated with the subscription.

title: SubscriptionListResponse
